pi_items.source: Code analysis: setup_task.sh InjectUser.java creates USERS record with FIRST_NAME='John', LAST_NAME='Doe'; verifier.py queries for 'John Doe'; task.json specifies this target
Code analysis: verifier.py line 22 checks for target_key='9876543210'; setup_task.sh and export_result.sh handle this key during task execution

Code analysis: Both InjectUser.java (line 43) and VerifyKey.java (line 37) use JDBC URL 'jdbc:derby:/opt/floreantpos/database/derby-server/posdb'; Official Floreant POS docs confirm posdb as standard database name; install scripts extract to /opt/floreantpos

privileged_info_summary: This task uses only synthetic data. The target employee is 'John Doe', a placeholder name created by the setup script via database injection. The target key card number '9876543210' is a synthetic identifier chosen for testing. The database is located at /opt/floreantpos/database/derby-server/posdb, which is the standard Floreant POS installation path on Linux systems. No real personally identifiable information or sensitive data is involved.
